description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a rooftop terrace featuring outdoor furniture and greenery. The exterior is composed of a mix of light and dark materials, including large glass windows and brick or concrete facades. The ground level includes a driveway with a parked car, a paved patio area with umbrellas and seating, and landscaped greenery with trees and shrubs. The upper floor has a spacious balcony and open rooftop spaces, some of which are furnished for relaxation. The windows are large and asymmetrically arranged, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements, blending seamlessly into the modern design.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, rooftop terrace, and landscaped outdoor areas. The exterior features a mix of brick, concrete, and glass with contemporary styling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rooftop terrace, large windows, and a paved patio with outdoor furniture and greenery.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the main entryway, driveway with car, and landscaped lawn with palm tree.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the balcony, rooftop terrace, and additional patio space with visible car and trees.
description_view_3: Direct front view focusing on the main entrance, driveway, and prominent tree adjacent to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with minimal overhang, no porch, and integrated into the facade with adjacent landscaping
